When Venus occupies the asterism Magha, and Jupiter
Pusya, kings will be happy and free (rom mutual hatred, and the
people, contented and bale and hearty.
[Cf.

Kedarabhatta's work on prosody. However it falls under the
category of ]

covering the chief star of or cutting through) the asterism Krttika,
Magha, RohinI, Sravana or Jyestha, the countries situated in the
west would be torn by troubles.
